---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash, unexpected behaviour, or visual regression
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

<!--
Thank you for filing a bug. Cork is local-first and does **not** send any
telemetry, so we depend on the information you paste here to reproduce the
problem.
-->

<!-- A clear description of the unexpected behaviour. -->

## What did you expect?

<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## Environment

- **Cork version:** <!-- Settings → Updates → Current version, e.g. v0.2.0 -->
- **OS + version:** <!-- e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11 23H2, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- **Vault size (approx.):** <!-- e.g. 47 notes, 1.2k notes -->
- **Installed from:** <!-- GitHub Release / built from source / other -->

## Crash log (if the app crashed or showed an error)

> Cork writes crash events to a local file. Nothing is sent automatically.
> Open **Settings → Diagnostics → Open crash log** and paste the last few
> entries below. Vault paths and credential-shaped strings are already
> redacted on disk, but please scan the snippet and remove anything you'd
> rather keep private.

```json
<!-- paste the last few JSON lines from crashes.log here -->
```

## Anything else?
